title: Inherited type parameters not recognized when used to parameterize another class in derived class

features.name: inherited_type_params_in_derived_class_nested_parametrization
features.description: Code should include a derived class that extends a parameterized base class and uses the inherited type parameters to parameterize another class instantiation within the derived class body.
features.snippet:
class base #(type T=int); T val; endclass
class derived #(type T=int) extends base #(T); endclass
class wrapper #(type T=int); T item; endclass
class child extends derived #(byte);
  wrapper #(T) inst; // inherited param T used to parametrize another class
endclass

features.name: uvm_driver_seq_item_pull_port_pattern
features.description: Code should include a UVM driver extending uvm_driver with type parameters and using inherited REQ/RSP to instantiate a pull port. This is the canonical UVM pattern where a derived driver class extends uvm_driver#(my_tx) and instantiates uvm_seq_item_pull_port#(REQ, RSP) using inherited type parameters.
